name: @substrat-run/demo-auth-server
description: Standalone Better Auth OIDC provider demo (auth-server) — see spec/concept.md

envSpec.label: Issuer origin
envSpec.description: The canonical public URL of this issuer. Becomes the OIDC `issuer` and the base of every discovery/token/JWKS URL.

envSpec.label: Admin email
envSpec.description: Bootstrap administrator address. With ADMIN_PASSWORD, the first admin is seeded on init — no setup-screen race. Leave both blank to bootstrap via the setup screen instead.

envSpec.label: Admin password
envSpec.description: Bootstrap administrator password (at least 8 characters). Delivered as a secret; change it after first sign-in.

envSpec.label: Sender address
envSpec.description: The From address for password-reset and verification mail. Its domain must be onboarded for sending. Absent ⇒ a safe default; without an EMAIL binding, mail is dropped.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,app -c blue,green "tsx src/server.ts" "pnpm --dir app dev"
